publicFlow.name: Choose entry point
publicFlow.rule: The selected entry point only affects filtering. The final booking still needs service_id, provider_id, start_time, end_time and client_id.

publicFlow.name: Create hold
publicFlow.rule: Use holds when the user spends time filling forms after selecting a slot.

publicFlow.name: Collect client
publicFlow.rule: Confirming a hold without existing client_id requires client_details.

adminApprovalFlow: Admin opens pending bookings from /api/admin/dashboard/bootstrap or /api/admin/bookings?status_filter=pending.
Admin confirms with POST /api/admin/bookings/{booking_id}/confirm or cancels with POST /api/admin/bookings/{booking_id}/cancel.
UI updates booking status and optionally sends notification when notifications are implemented.
